Home/Talent Program
Creative Empowerment

Join Our Talent Program

We empower Youth, Women, the Elderly, and marginalized groups around Volcanoes National Park by preserving and celebrating our rich Rwandan cultural heritage.

🥁

Cultural Arts

Master traditional Rwandan dance and drum lines under experienced instructors.

🪡

Handicrafts

Learn basket weaving and traditional carving to create premium artisan products.

🌱

Sustainable Lives

Empowering ex-poachers and youth with alternative, sustainable incomes.

Submit Your Application

Tell us about yourself and what you want to learn or showcase. Our team reviews applications weekly.

🔐

Account Required

To protect your data and allow you to track your application status securely, please create an applicant profile or sign in.
